label: Docking

rdkit_estimate.note: Always-available reproducible affinity estimate; zero extra deps.

vina.note: Set DIMITRI_VINA to an AutoDock Vina/smina binary + provide a prepared receptor PDBQT for true physics-based docking.

description: Molecular docking scores. RDKit-based affinity estimate out of the box (offline, no setup); AutoDock Vina binary when configured. Writes a live docking-score column back to the ligand table for generate → dock → rank.
